title: T-114 — Reference Audit Trail screen (SET-054 §8.6)
prompt:
# T-114 — Reference Audit Trail screen (SET-054 §8.6)

PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §8.6 (Reference Tables UI surfaces)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build SET-054 Reference Audit Trail — per-row history viewer with diff between consecutive versions for a single reference_table row. Distinct from SET-013 global audit log (T-079) which is partition-scoped across all entities; this is row-focused with inline diff.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/reference/[table_code]/[row_key]/history/page.tsx (Server Component) reads audit_log entries WHERE table_name='reference_tables' AND entity_id=row_key for caller's org_id, ordered by created_at DESC.
2. List shows: created_at, action (insert|update|delete), user_id, summary of changed columns.
3. Each row expandable to show side-by-side old_value / new_value (re-uses the diff helper from T-108 SET-042 if available; otherwise local recursive walker).
4. Header strip shows: table_code, row_key, current row JSON snapshot (collapsible).
5. RBAC: requires `settings.audit.read` and `settings.reference.read`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/reference/[table_code]/[row_key]/history/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/reference/[table_code]/[row_key]/history/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test seeds 3 audit_log entries for one reference_tables row (insert + 2 updates); asserts ordered render, expand-to-diff, RBAC 403.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/reference/[table_code]/[row_key]/history/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + diff render + expand control.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate SET-013 global viewer (T-079); this is row-scoped.
- Do not bypass withOrgContext (RLS).
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0).

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

pipeline_inputs.description: Reference Audit Trail (SET-054): per-row history viewer with diff between consecutive versions.
pipeline_inputs.details: PRD §8.6 SET-054: `Per-row history z diff viewer`. Distinct from SET-013 (T-079) which is the global audit log filtered by date partition; this screen drills into a single (table_code, row_key) tuple. Diff helper may import from T-108 if exposed as shared util in `packages/ui` or `apps/web/lib`.
out_of_scope: Global audit log (covered by SET-013 / T-079)
Restore-from-history action (defer; current scope is read-only)
acceptance_criteria: Given 3 audit_log entries exist for reference_tables row (table_code='allergens', row_key='gluten') — 1 insert + 2 updates — when the page renders, then 3 history rows display in created_at DESC with action badges.
Given the user expands the most recent update row, when the diff renders, then changed columns show side-by-side old_value vs new_value with added/removed/changed highlighting.
Given the header strip renders, when the row is currently active, then the current snapshot JSON section is collapsible and reflects the latest values.
Given the caller lacks `settings.audit.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test seeds 3 audit_log entries + asserts list order, expand-to-diff, RBAC 403, header collapsible.
GREEN: implement Server Component + expand control + diff render.
risk_red_lines: Do not duplicate SET-013 global viewer (T-079); this is row-scoped.
